title: Midterm Make-up Exams Applications - Overlapping Exams Notice Petitions
content:
Midterm Make-up Exams Applications - Overlapping Exams Notice Petitions

Students who cannot attend the midterm exams of the 2024-2025 Academic Year Fall Semester midterm

exams due to excuses

should upload

the petition

to the ‘Online Petition System’

with the report/document

between

29 November

2024

.

For Online Petition System login:

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

You can log in to the system with your student e-mail address and password that you have used on ALMS/STIX.

Students whose midterm exams overlap in

the 2024-2025 Academic Year Fall Semester should apply for midterm make-up exams and

write both of the overlapping exams

in their make-up exam petitions.

The exam of the course belonging to your department / class will be taken on the day and time specified in the exam programme. For the exam of your other conflicting course, you need to apply for the midterm excuse exam by logging into the Online Petition System.

Midterm make-up exam application results will be announced on

.

Make-up exams will be held between

. You can learn the details about your make-up exam through the announcements of the course instructor.

We wish you success in your exams.

Petition for Make-Up Exams Request
